# Portfolio Documentation Template

Use the structure below when generating `documentations/PORTFOLIO_OVERVIEW.md`.

---

```markdown
# Sean Galant — Portfolio Overview

> Auto-generated documentation of the portfolio website. Last updated: {{DATE}}

## Table of Contents

- [Owner Profile](#owner-profile)
- [Site Architecture](#site-architecture)
- [Tech Stack](#tech-stack)
- [Projects](#projects)
- [Skills](#skills)
- [UI/UX Features](#uiux-features)
- [Styling Architecture](#styling-architecture)
- [Build & Deployment](#build--deployment)
- [Utilities & Patterns](#utilities--patterns)

---
```
